## Testing Checklist

- [ ] Loaded extension in Chrome (`chrome://extensions` > Load unpacked)
- [ ] Tested on Medium
- [ ] Tested on Substack
- [ ] Tested on WordPress
- [ ] Tested on Twitter/X
- [ ] Tested on a generic blog
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Existing functionality still works
